item.title: It's time for yet another unhinged XL Saturday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends
strip clubs aren't really my scene but this made me laugh
i guess
as is tradition
chimkin
i'm usually that friend
this is me right now
love all these guys but it's kinda true. moreso for walken and gottfried than freeman and goldblum imo
mmm hmm
unfortunately
that cantina chicken shit is good
I have absolutely zero idea what anything in this meme is talking about/referencing
the horror classic we all love
i'm a little scared
is there any other kind of corollance?
a big favorite as a lad
if you don't have one, yes you do because uncle cel is your friend
that's my set.. have a great night gang!!

item.dc:creator: MedicalScience

item.title: Mentally healthy dump: beauty
item.description:
From what I understand this is a little girl finding out she's been adopted.
"Красота спасёт мир" "The world will be saved by beauty" - 'The Idiot' by Fyodor Dostoyevsky Allowing compassion to take point on our path through life has unique challenges. Sometimes people take advantage of you and it's easy to want to blame them, to blame the world, to let our hearts turn cold, succumbing to the same fears and isolation. Meeting our own budding apathy, or the apathy of others with curious compassion is a potent antidote. I've had people tell me that being nice won't get me anywhere, that people will fuck me over, that I'm being foolish, naive, that I'm acting like an idiot. I've certainly felt that way before. But I've been cruel. I've been calloused. I've taken advantage of people. And I've seen the beauty I'm capable of when I treat myself with curious compassion. I'm grateful for my idiot eyes being open today. On the days they rest, I can't see the beauty, and I feel more alone than I have words to express. And so I'm grateful for my idiot comrades gently prying them back open. I hope this can do the same for you. -comet
item.dc:creator: iamthecomet

item.title: Images of Note: Sabotage
item.description:
HELL YEAH
yeah :(
Someone make this.
...yet...
MORE DRESSES NEED POCKETS! AM I RIGHT LADIES?!
mood
trans rights!!
owo
adorable
Here's something to keep you up at night: If the US does invade Greenland, Denmark is a NATO country and an EU country, meaning an attack by the US will likely mean Canada, The UK, and the Rest of the EU declare war on the USA, sparking World War 3.
lol wat
Coincidence? I think not.
Centaur rights now!
D:
They want LGBTQ people mistreated and people in massive amounts of debt because they want indentured servants who produce more indentured servants.
uwu
Despite their appearances, Linux absolutely bodies both of them.
Hi Hugo
EMAILS!
burn it all down
why is the bird upside down.
It terrifies them.
We need this
http://discord.abbii.gay: For Chats http://twitch.abbii.gay: For Stream http://tumblr.abbii.gay: For shitposts http://mastodon.abbii.gay: For microblogging http://bsky.abbii.gay: For Bluesky http://onlyfans.abbii.gay: for Tips!

item.title: And the truth is the hostages were treated with resp, and the biggest danger they faced was from Israeli bombs
item.description: Question: would you rather be an Israeli being held hostage by Hamas, or a Palestinian being held hostage by Israel?
item.dc:creator: chukyrlaw

item.title: Maybe we should be concerned...
item.description: FBI top brass fired. Prosecutors fired. Union contracts busted. Tariffs. Elon inside the Treasury. And more. All in 2 weeks. I feel like I'm in a bad dystopian movie from the early 80s... https://www.huffpost.com/entry/donald-trump-inauguration-live-updates_n_678a8f36e4b097ab56976f5b/liveblog_679e963ce4b06e8d96a6e04a
item.dc:creator: AbeFromanPartyOf3

item.title: I'm not addicted to drugs or a drug addict. I do cocaine a few weekends throughout the year here and there. This time, I took too much...
item.description: They had to put me in a coma for two days. On a ventilator, catheter, the whole nine yards. I had to be shuttled in an ambulance to the emergency room. I thought I was a goner for sure and took fentanyl laced cocaine. It wasn't fentanyl. I just did too much. Kicker is; I wasn't insured. Total cost was $21,000.
item.dc:creator: kickmyballsrealhard
